patterns: Mixed on macro tech timing — often early by 2-4 years

highlight_takes.claim_text: Default-alive companies will outperform default-dead ones
highlight_takes.verdict_summary: Confirmed across YC batches 2015-2024 — default-alive predicted survival more reliably than any other early-stage metric

highlight_takes.claim_text: Cities will remain primary concentrators of ambition
highlight_takes.verdict_summary: Half-true through 2019; post-2020 remote shift redistributed ambition across smaller hubs (Austin, Miami, Bangalore)

highlight_takes.claim_text: Most successful startups will come from SF indefinitely
highlight_takes.verdict_summary: Refuted — by 2025 YC graduates founded in 14+ metros; SF share dropped from ~70% to ~38%

claim_b.text: VCs are actually more upstanding than I thought, just timid

contradictions.contradiction_summary: In 2005 he called VCs arrogant and sneaky; in 2008 he conceded they were actually more upstanding than he'd thought — just timid.
